# Support Email Templates

## Install Issue Reply

Subject: BIM Command Center installation support

Hello,

Thank you for contacting LUA BIM LABS support.

Please send the following information so we can investigate:

- Revit version
- Windows version
- BIM Command Center version
- Screenshot of the installer or Revit error
- Whether Revit was closed during installation
- Whether you installed as administrator

We will review the information and reply with the next steps.

## Entitlement Issue Reply

Subject: BIM Command Center subscription check support

Hello,

BIM Command Center uses Autodesk App Store entitlement to verify subscription or trial access.

Please check:

- You are signed in to Revit with the Autodesk account that downloaded or purchased the app.
- Your trial or subscription is active in Autodesk App Store.
- Your network allows access to Autodesk App Store services.

If the issue continues, please send a screenshot of the subscription message and your Revit version. Do not send passwords or private project models.

## Payment Or Cancellation Issue Reply

Subject: BIM Command Center payment or subscription billing support

Hello,

BIM Command Center purchases and subscription billing are handled through Autodesk App Store supported payment flows such as PayPal or BlueSnap.

For card, PayPal, BlueSnap, cancellation or billing issues, please use the relevant payment platform or Autodesk App Store support flow. LUA BIM LABS support can help verify whether the add-in is receiving a valid entitlement response, but we cannot access or change your card details.

Please do not send card numbers, CVV codes, PayPal passwords, BlueSnap passwords or Autodesk account passwords.

## Dashboard Blank Reply

Subject: BIM Command Center dashboard display support

Hello,

Please try the following:

- Restart Revit.
- Confirm Microsoft Edge WebView2 Runtime is installed.
- Check whether company firewall or antivirus policy blocks local dashboard components.
- Test with a blank/sample Revit model.

If the dashboard is still blank, please send your Revit version, Windows version, product version and a screenshot.

## Model-Specific Command Issue Reply

Subject: BIM Command Center command support

Hello,

Please send:

- Command name
- Revit version
- Model type: local, central, cloud workshared or linked model
- Category/view/element context
- Screenshot or short screen recording
- Steps to reproduce on a sample model, if possible

Please do not send confidential project models unless we specifically request a reduced sample file.
